info.title: Project Template Web Services
info.description: Web Services for managing the Project Template modeler.

get.summary: Search Project Templates using the provided input string.

parameters.name: searchStr
parameters.description: Search Criteria; 2 or more characters required.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: The number of objects to return; default 50; max 1000

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: The number of objects to skip in case of paginating through the serach results; default 0

parameters.name: $include
parameters.description:
Specify sub-resources that should be returned by the web request. Provide combination of comma separated entries including keywords none & all plus payload specific sub-resources:

[!]ownerInfo, [!]originatorInfo, [!]tasks, [!]members, [!]subTypesInfo, [!]subTypesAndPolicies, [!]folders, [!]questions, [!]calendar, [!]predecessors, [!]references, [!]deliverables, [!]route, [!]contents, [!]assignees, [!]candidateAssignees, [!]checklistReferences, [!]content, [!]sovaccess, [!]questionTasks

Some entries are enabled by default which are described in the schema section of the response payload. For more information about refinement, see 6W REST Services Principles - Refinement Section.

get.summary: Get a specific Project Template detail and related data.

parameters.name: $include
parameters.description:
Specify sub-resources that should be returned by the web request. Provide combination of comma separated entries including keywords none & all plus payload specific sub-resources:

Some entries are enabled by default which are described in the schema section of the response payload. For more information about refinement, see 6W REST Services Principles - Refinement Section.

parameters.name: $include
parameters.description:
Specify sub-resources that should be returned by the web request. Provide combination of comma separated entries including keywords none & all plus payload specific sub-resources:

identifier.description: The unique object identifier when an object is represented by a Public Resource URI.

source.description: The object server URL when an object is represented by a Public Resource URI.

relativePath.description: The object resource path when an object is represented by a Public Resource URI.

csrf.description: CSRF object is required to be sent back for update operations and may be provided with read operations.

success.description: The response data when the request succeeds with 200 status code.
Reflects true to indicate successful request.

error-400.description: The response data when the request fails with 400 or 500 error.

error.description: An NLS error message.  In the case of a 400 error, the message is precise.  In the case of 500 error, the message is generic.

internalError.description: The technical reason of the failure - usually associated with a 500 error; this is not an NLS message and reflects the MQL or runtime exception.

SecurityContext.name: SecurityContext

Accept-Language.description: Identifies the locale for the web request.

ENO_CSRF_TOKEN.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN
ENO_CSRF_TOKEN.description: The ENOVIA CSRF token which is typically required for update operations.  Retrieve using {server}/resources/v1/application/CSRF

fields.name: $fields
fields.description: Specify resource and sub-resource fields that should be returned by the web request  Fields include keywords none & all plus payload fields - see schema response payload.  For more information, see 6W REST Services Principles - Refinement Section
